European excellence.
Swiss privacy.
We're here to provide a reliable, secure cloud storage that puts your privacy first. As a Swiss-based cloud solution, we follow the world’s strictest data privacy standards. And our rock-solid encryption ensures your files are always secure.
No compromises. No tracking. No third-party access.
Learn more
Take control.
It's your data.
You choose where your files live:

2 TB Shared link traffic
Prices are final. No setup fees or other hidden charges!
Can I, later on, upgrade to a larger Lifetime Plan?
14 days money back guarantee!
Secure 256-bit SSL Encrypted payment
Included with every Premium plan
Security
Keeping your data safe at all times
pCloud keeps your files safeguarded by strict Swiss privacy laws and stores them in certified, secure data centres. Our TLS/SSL channel protection and 256-bit AES encryption deliver military-grade security to protect your data.
File management
Never lose a file
Upload files of any size with unrestricted transfer speeds.
Restore previous versions of your files.
Recover your data from up to 30 days ago.
Effortless collaboration
Work together with ease
Easily share files with password-protected links, collaborate in shared folders, gather files with requests, and impress with branded shares.
Media and usability
Stream and access your media files without limits
Freely stream and enjoy your favorite media anytime with our built-in Music and Video Player. Keep all your entertainment accessible and organised in one place.
Seamless access & sync
Your files. Anytime, anywhere.
Easily back up your phone’s gallery and desktop files.
Work on files without taking up local storage space.
Access your files even when offline and sync them later.
Automatically keep your files in sync across all your devices.
Third-party backup
Effortlessly transfer and back up your data
Ensure your memories and important files are always safe, no matter where they were originally stored. pCloud makes transferring your content simple, quick, and reliable.
Used by people working at:
More users. More savings. One plan.
Want to bring your family or friends along?
Check pCloud Family Plan - up to 5 users, one affordable solution.
FIND OUT MORE

General
An application programming interface (API) specifies how some software components should interact with each others. All API calls consist of a
"call name"
, called from now on
"method"
, and multiple parameters.
Here we describe how any application could access and use the data that is stored in pCloud - how to add pCloud's  functionallity in your own application.
The following interfaces are provided to access the pCloud API:
HTTP / JSON protocol
- useful for most web and mobile applications
Binary protocol
- useful when performance is required
Important notes
pCloud has two data centers. One in
United States
and one in
Europe
.
As a consequence API calls have to be made to the correct API host name depending were the user has been registered –
api.pcloud.com for United States
and
eapi.pcloud.com for Europe
.
If you use one of our SDKs this is handled automatically. Otherwise read
OAuth 2.0 authorize
documentation.
Some parameters can be bundled with all methods and some are method specific. The parameters for all methods are called
global parameters
. The specific parameters could be seen in the methods definitions.
Note:
Authentication is not required for all methods.
All files and folders can be accessed by either full
path
(discouraged)
or a
fileid
/
folderid
.
When creating a file/folder using  the
id
approach  you need to pass parent
folderid
and
name
.
For access/deletion you need just
folderid/fileid
.
The root folder of every user always has folderid of
0
.
Full paths always start with
/
. Trailing slashes MUST NOT be present.
Implementations MUST accept 64 bit numbers for all ids and especially when  dealing with quotas and file sizes (that are in bytes).
2014 © pCloud.
Terms and Conditions

Privacy Policy

hits.title: Another user's pCloud setup is visible in my pcloud drive
Get 30GB free lifetime cloud storage from pCloud Use code “HACKERNEWS”
“We are a safe cloud storage ” No pcloud, no
Dropbox challenger pCloud just became profitable
PCloud offers a lifetime storage solution
Cloud Storage pCloud Increases Hacking Challenge Prize to $100,000 for Hackers

analysis.name: pCloud
analysis.value_proposition: Swiss-based secure cloud storage with lifetime one-time-payment plans, client-side encryption, and user-selectable data regions for privacy-first individuals and teams.
analysis.ideal_customer: Privacy-conscious individuals, photographers, and small teams seeking a permanent alternative to recurring-subscription cloud storage

features.name: cloud file storage
features.description: Store files of any size in the cloud with unlimited upload and download speeds
features.evidence_quote: Store files of any size. Enjoy unlimited speed for uploads and downloads.

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Share files and folders with anyone via secure links
features.evidence_quote: Easily share files with password-protected links, collaborate in shared folders

features.name: password-protected links
features.description: Set passwords on shared file and folder links to restrict access
features.evidence_quote: simple file sharing with password protection and expiration dates

features.name: link expiration dates
features.description: Set expiration dates on shared file and folder links
features.evidence_quote: simple file sharing with password protection and expiration dates

features.name: file versioning
features.description: Restore previous file versions and recover deleted data up to 30 days back
features.evidence_quote: Restore previous versions of your files. Recover your data from up to 30 days ago.

features.name: trash recovery
features.description: Recover deleted files from trash within the retention window

features.name: auto-backup
features.description: Automatically back up phone gallery and desktop files to the cloud
features.evidence_quote: Easily back up your phone's gallery and desktop files.

features.name: cross-device sync
features.description: Automatically keep files in sync across all connected devices
features.evidence_quote: Automatically keep your files in sync across all your devices.

features.name: offline access
features.description: Access files offline and sync changes when reconnected
features.evidence_quote: Access your files even when offline and sync them later.

features.name: virtual drive
features.description: Mount cloud storage as a local virtual drive without consuming local disk space
features.evidence_quote: Work on files without taking up local storage space.

features.name: built-in music player
features.description: Stream and play audio files directly from cloud storage
features.evidence_quote: Freely stream and enjoy your favorite media anytime with our built-in Music and Video Player.

features.name: built-in video player
features.description: Stream and play video files directly from cloud storage
features.evidence_quote: Freely stream and enjoy your favorite media anytime with our built-in Music and Video Player.

features.name: shared folders
features.description: Collaborate with others through shared folders with synced changes

features.name: file requests
features.description: Collect files from others via upload-request links without requiring a pCloud account

features.name: branded links
features.description: Share files and folders with custom-branded share links

features.name: upload links
features.description: Create upload-only links allowing external parties to deposit files into your storage

features.name: public links
features.description: Generate public share links for individual files, folders, and folder trees

features.name: client-side encryption
features.description: Optional zero-knowledge client-side encryption add-on for maximum privacy

features.name: tls/ssl encryption
features.description: TLS/SSL channel protection for all data in transit
features.evidence_quote: TLS/SSL channel protection and 256-bit AES encryption deliver military-grade security

features.name: 256-bit aes encryption
features.description: Military-grade 256-bit AES encryption for data at rest
features.evidence_quote: TLS/SSL channel protection and 256-bit AES encryption deliver military-grade security

features.name: data region selection
features.description: Choose whether data is stored in US or European data centers at account creation
features.evidence_quote: You choose where your files live: Europe or USA.

features.name: swiss privacy compliance
features.description: Data governed by Swiss privacy laws; no tracking and no third-party access
features.evidence_quote: As a Swiss-based cloud solution, we follow the world's strictest data privacy standards.

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: GDPR-compliant data handling and privacy practices

features.name: third-party backup
features.description: Import and back up content from external third-party services into pCloud
features.evidence_quote: Ensure your memories and important files are always safe, no matter where they were originally stored.

features.name: photo management
features.description: Organized photo storage, gallery backup, and browsing features

features.name: media management
features.description: Organize and access audio and video files from cloud storage

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: Native iOS and Android apps for mobile access to cloud files
features.evidence_quote: On a laptop, phone, or tablet. From the city, beach, or the savanna.

features.name: desktop apps
features.description: Desktop client applications for Windows, macOS, and Linux

features.name: thumbnail generation
features.description: Generate and retrieve image thumbnails via API

features.name: archive and zip
features.description: Create, download, save, and extract ZIP archives from cloud-stored files

features.name: video streaming links
features.description: Generate adaptive streaming links for video files including HLS

features.name: audio streaming links
features.description: Generate direct streaming links for audio files

features.name: developer api
features.description: Full REST API for programmatic access to all pCloud storage functionality
features.evidence_quote: Here we describe how any application could access and use the data that is stored in pCloud

features.name: oauth 2.0
features.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication support for third-party application integration

features.name: sdks
features.description: Official client SDKs for C, Java, JavaScript, PHP, and Swift
features.evidence_quote: SDKs: C, Java, Javascript, Php, Swift

features.name: binary protocol
features.description: High-performance binary protocol for API access when throughput is critical
features.evidence_quote: Binary protocol - useful when performance is required

features.name: collections
features.description: Organize files into named collections (albums/playlists) spanning folders

features.name: file checksums
features.description: API method to verify file integrity via checksum

features.name: async file downloads
features.description: Asynchronous file download API for non-blocking retrieval operations

features.name: diff and event history api
features.description: API to track account-wide changes and per-file event history

features.name: shared link traffic quota
features.description: Per-plan bandwidth allocation for traffic served via public shared links

features.name: lifetime plans
features.description: One-time payment perpetual storage plans as an alternative to recurring subscriptions

features.name: family plan
features.description: Multi-user shared storage plan for up to 5 family members
features.evidence_quote: Check pCloud Family Plan - up to 5 users, one affordable solution.

features.name: business plan
features.description: Team-oriented storage plan with collaboration features for business users

features.name: pcloud pass
features.description: Integrated password manager product sold alongside or bundled with cloud storage

features.name: pcloud transfer
features.description: Standalone free tool for sending large files to anyone without a pCloud account

features.name: pcloud save
features.description: Browser tool for saving web content directly to pCloud storage

features.name: social media integration
features.description: Integration with social media platforms for backup or sharing content
features.evidence_quote: the kind of social media integration that few of its rivals can match

features.name: share request management
features.description: API to create, accept, decline, cancel, and manage folder share requests
features.evidence_quote: sharefolder, listshares, sharerequestinfo, cancelsharerequest, acceptshare, declineshare

features.name: transfer api
features.description: API for initiating and tracking file transfer uploads

features.name: newsletter management
features.description: API endpoints for newsletter subscription and email verification

features.name: reseller program
features.description: Partner program allowing resellers to sell pCloud storage to end customers

features.name: affiliate program
features.description: Affiliate commission program for referring new customers

features.name: multi-region api endpoints
features.description: Separate API hostnames for US and EU data centers to match user account region
features.evidence_quote: api.pcloud.com for United States and eapi.pcloud.com for Europe

features.name: upload progress tracking
features.description: API endpoint to monitor in-progress file upload status

features.name: certified data centers
features.description: Files stored in certified, audited secure data centers in EU and US
features.evidence_quote: Our ultra-secure data centers are certified and built for maximum protection.

differentiators: Lifetime one-time payment plans (no recurring subscription required)
Swiss-based company governed by world's strictest privacy laws — no tracking, no third-party access
User-selectable data region at account level (Europe or USA)
No setup fees or hidden charges
Optional zero-knowledge client-side encryption add-on (pCloud Crypto)
$100,000 public hacking challenge as proof of security

recent_ships.what: pCloud Pass password manager launched as standalone product

recent_ships.source: HN: 'Dropbox challenger pCloud just became profitable'

praised: Security and encryption, speed, and excellent price. That is pCloud. — Nelkis V.
The Best Cloud Service Available with Lifetime Deal — Amit B.
pCloud is a better alternative to DropBox — Vince C.
Better solution than Google Drive. — Travis J.
pCloud offers great performance, simple file sharing with password protection and expiration dates, plus unmatched lifetime plans.
pCloud provides excellent backup options, fast upload speeds, and flexible sharing controls without compromising privacy.
pCloud is a great value cloud storage service with a fantastic free plan and the kind of social media integration that few of its rivals can match.
complaints: Security incident: 'Another user's pCloud setup is visible in my pcloud drive' — HN thread indicating a data exposure bug
Skepticism of safety claims: 'We are a safe cloud storage. No pcloud, no' — HN comment questioning marketing

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 10 GB storage, basic file storage and sharing

tiers.name: Premium 500 GB (Lifetime)
tiers.headline_inclusions: 500 GB storage + 500 GB shared link traffic; one-time payment $199 (was $299)

tiers.name: Premium Plus 2 TB (Lifetime)
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 TB storage + 2 TB shared link traffic; one-time payment $399 (was $599)

tiers.name: Ultra 10 TB (Lifetime)
tiers.headline_inclusions: 10 TB storage + 2 TB shared link traffic; one-time payment $1190 (was $1890)

pricing.notes: Primary pricing model is one-time lifetime payments, not subscriptions. Monthly and annual subscription toggles exist on pricing page but prices were not captured in source scrape. All lifetime prices shown are discounted from list price. 14-day money-back guarantee on all lifetime plans. Family plan (up to 5 users) and Business plan exist with separate pricing pages not captured. Shared link traffic is a distinct quota from storage quota and varies by tier.
